regions.name: Hokkaido
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit in winter for world-class skiing and snow festivals, or summer for wildflowers and outdoor activities.

regions.name: Tōhoku
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Spring offers cherry blossoms and mild weather; autumn brings vibrant foliage.

regions.name: Kantō
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Spring and autumn offer pleasant weather; avoid summer heat and humidity.

regions.name: Chūbu
regions.bestTimeToVisit: September through November provides clear skies and comfortable temperatures for alpine exploration.

regions.name: Kansai
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Spring cherry blossoms and autumn foliage are ideal; avoid humid summers.

regions.name: Chūgoku
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Spring and autumn offer ideal weather for sightseeing and exploring historical sites.

regions.name: Shikoku
regions.bestTimeToVisit: October through November provides pleasant temperatures and clear skies.

regions.name: Kyushu
regions.bestTimeToVisit: October through April offers mild weather; avoid the rainy tsuyu season in June.

regions.name: Okinawa
regions.bestTimeToVisit: April through May and October through November offer warm weather without typhoon risk.
